openQuestions.text: Where does system-spec-kit have the greatest doc/code drift right now (validator, templates, manifest, MCP tools)?
Are there test-coverage gaps in validate.sh --strict, graph-metadata-backfill, generate-context.js, or anchor/template-headers checks that mask real bugs?
Does mcp-coco-index's CLI/MCP routing match the documented decision tree, and is its index freshness behavior reliable across edits?
Is mcp-coco-index actually ingesting .opencode/skills/sk-code/ resources? Are queries surfacing them with usable rank?
What concrete OpenCode references/assets are missing from sk-code/references/opencode/ and sk-code/assets/opencode/ that the smart router would benefit from?
Does the sk-code router's STACK_FOLDERS contract match on-disk structure today (post-069 motion_dev, post-068 sk-doc reorg)?
When /speckit:complete writes inside .opencode/, is sk-code's OpenCode surface correctly loaded (smart-router cross-skill integration)?
